topic_text: When You enter an area from iOS Location, do Set temperature range using Nest Thermostat. Set thermostat when you enter area.. Use to set temperature range when entering an area
When You exit an area from Location, do Enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome. If you exit an area then turn your heating off. If you exit an area then turn your heating off

When You exit an area from Location, do Set a zone temperature using Honeywell Single-zone Thermostat. Lower temperature when leaving area.. When leaving a specified area, the temperature will be lowered to the new set zone temperature.
When You enter an area from iOS Location, do Set temperature range using Nest Thermostat. Set temp when you get close to home. When you enter an area close to home then the Nest will set the temp.
When You exit an area from Location, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. Leave an area turns Nest down. When you leave your house it might be nice to get your nest to turn itself down

When Enter an area from BMW Labs, do Set room temperature using Nefit Easy. Connect the Nefit Easy with your BMW. With this recipe, you can set your heating with an Nefit Easy, to turn on when you are driving in a set radius of you house with BMW connected drive,

When You exit an area from Location, do Pause using ThermoSmart. If you leave home, the ThermoSmart is paused. If you leave home or an other location, the ThermoSmart gets paused.
When You exit an area from Location, do Pause using ThermoSmart. Pause your ThermoSmart leaving your home. Do not heat your home while away, ever again.

When You exit an area from Location, do Set Temperature using Heatmiser. Adjust thermostat when you leave a specific location. When you leave a specified location, automatically set your thermostat to a certain temperature.

When Vehicle leaves a place from Zubie, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. When I leave home, adjust my Nest thermostat to save energy costs. This recipe triggers on  departure from your home location and allows you to set the temperature on your Nest thermostat accordingly to save money on heating or cooling

When You exit an area from Location, do Set new mode using Caleo. Let your Caleos know when you leave your city (iOS)!. You can setup an area (which encompasses your home, work and other places you usually visit while being in town) where if you leave it, your Caleos will turn to Long Term Away and thus saving you energy by not heating up the house when you don't need it! (Best used in combination with https://ifttt.com/recipes/329618-let-your-caleos-know-when-you-are-back-in-town-ios)
